title: Rosethorn GUI
description: a GUI as you never seen before - between petals and thorns
body:
## YOUR STYLIZED DARK THEMED GUI PACK, NOW ON MODRINTH!

### PROBABLY WORKS ON EVERY VERSION
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Hzrbz2E0sws" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This is my second resource pack that is (mostly)entirely based on a single color palette, but this time is more of a dark mode gui.






-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------






here is the palette i used
![the palette used on the making of the GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3b4b721fc4df490bbbe5b448b707a096134deab.png)

I really hope you like how i designed every part.

you can use it on your videos and gameplays too :P
